questions.text: Which is the largest ocean on Earth?
questions.explanation: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest ocean, covering more than 30% of Earth's surface.

questions.text: Which TWO of the following are countries in South America? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: Brazil and Argentina are both located in South America. Mexico is in North America and Spain is in Europe.

questions.text: What is the chemical symbol for gold?
questions.explanation: Gold's chemical symbol is Au, from the Latin word 'aurum'. Ag is silver (argentum).

questions.text: Arrange the planets in order from closest to furthest from the Sun:
questions.explanation: The inner planets in order: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars — with Mercury being closest to the Sun.

questions.text: In which year did World War II end?
questions.explanation: World War II ended in 1945 — in Europe on May 8 (V-E Day) and in the Pacific on September 2 (V-J Day).

questions.text: Which TWO inventions are credited to Thomas Edison? (Choose two.)
questions.explanation: Edison invented the phonograph (1877) and developed the practical incandescent light bulb (1879). The telephone was Bell's and the radio is credited to Marconi/Tesla.
